title: Dogfood slice set
goal: Commit real .workflow/slices/slice-021..030.json so Khazad-Doom can run its own roadmap.
acceptance: The dogfood slices validate with khazad-doom slices validate.
Each slice has clear acceptance criteria and verification policy.
must_ask_if: The slice requires changing the JSON-only worker result contract incompatibly.
The implementation would remove existing CLI/daemon commands.
Acceptance criteria conflict with the Khazad-Doom rule: You shall not slop.
